confirmRemove: Confirm to delete the data in ${name}?
getTab: Print out all opened custom tabs in the debugger
name: Dinox Sync Plugin

hello.makesure: This is a plugin for syncing Dinox notes to SiYuan Note. Please configure your Dinox Token and target Notebook ID in the settings.

hintDesc:
Dinox Sync Plugin v1.0
🔗 Sync notes with Dinox app
📝 Support bi-directional sync
⚙️ Configurable sync options
